sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18371" key="a)filosta/xuos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφῐλο-στάχῠος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,</foreign> <sense id="n18371.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without ears of corn, starving,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πενία</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.40.8</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Maced.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
